content:
✨ lama-loca | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: An AI-powered personal study assistant that processes user-provided documents to generate various academic outputs and answer questions, all while operating completely offline.
✨ Key Features: • Chat with your books for real-time answers • Generate academic reports (DOCX, MD) • Create PowerPoint presentations (PPTX) • Produce structured study notes • Write academic essays
📖 Summary: Lama Loca is an offline AI study assistant that learns from your personal documents (PDF, EPUB, DOCX, etc.) to generate reports, presentations, summaries, and answer questions. It processes your data locally, ensuring privacy and security.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
